title: ranunculus fluitans subsp. bachii
intro: Ranunculus fluitans subsp. bachii, also known as Alpine Buttercup or Ranunculus alpinus, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Ranunculaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can aid in healing wounds and reducing swelling. The health benefits of Ranunculus fluitans subsp. bachii include its ability to help alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties. Ranunculus fluitans subsp. bachii is often prepared as a tincture, decoction, or infusion, and is used in herbal medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
